assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 43 shows JQL: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. The section is titled '3. Ready for QA' confirming it is the third query. ready-for-qa.md line 9 confirms the same JQL.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md shows per-issue analysis for all 3 candidates (TC-9020, TC-9023, TC-9026). Each has a 'Linked Remediation Tasks (Depend)' section. TC-9020 lists TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed). TC-9023 lists TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress). TC-9026 shows 'None'. Line 25 states: 'each candidate is evaluated by inspecting its issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 49 includes TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with 'Remediation Tasks: TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. ready-for-qa.md line 51-53 states 'ALL 2 linked remediation Tasks are in terminal status (Done or Closed)' and 'Result: QUALIFIES — Ready for QA'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 52: 'TC-9023 (In Progress, CVE-2026-39102) — remediation task TC-9025 still In Progress'. ready-for-qa.md lines 76-77: 'TC-9025 is still In Progress. 1 of 2 linked Tasks is incomplete.' Result: 'EXCLUDED — Remediation in progress'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 53: 'TC-9026 (Modified, CVE-2026-39330) — no linked remediation Tasks (no Depend links)'. ready-for-qa.md line 92: 'Linked Remediation Tasks (Depend): None'. Line 94: 'No linked Tasks with link type Depend exist on this issue.' Result: 'EXCLUDED — No remediation to verify'.

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 47-49 show a table with column header 'Remediation Tasks' and value 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' for TC-9020. ready-for-qa.md line 106 summary table also shows 'Depend Links' column with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: Only TC-9020 qualifies as Ready for QA. discovery-listing.md line 57: 'TC-9020: All linked remediation Tasks are completed. Consider transitioning to ON_QA.' ready-for-qa.md line 55: 'Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA. All remediation Tasks are complete.' ready-for-qa.md line 113: 'TC-9020: Consider transitioning to ON_QA.'
